reasoning: The control SC-7(28) focuses on prohibiting direct connections to public networks, which can be mapped to Kubernetes by ensuring that network policies are in place to deny ingress by default, restricting the use of LoadBalancer service types to prevent exposing services directly to the internet, and ensuring that any ingress traffic is secured with TLS. These checks ensure that Kubernetes clusters are not directly exposed to public networks without proper controls.
title: Boundary Protection - Boundary protection | connections to public networks prohibit the direct connect
